title: Aura
primeReason: Lay the phone flat, front camera up, and play with finger movements above it.
profTagline: Lay the phone flat, front camera up, and play music with finger movements above it — your hand's position picks a note in the chosen mood scale, your motion swells the voice, and a living three.js aura glows around it in the note's colour. Camera, synth and visuals all on your device, offline.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
